# CarbonFiles

CarbonFiles is a file-sharing platform with bucket-based organization, multi-auth (admin key, API key, JWT, upload token), content-addressable storage, real-time SignalR events, and client SDKs for TypeScript, C#, Python, and PowerShell. Two components: API backend (this repo) and Dashboard frontend (separate repo).

## Quick Start

```
Base URL: https://your-server.com (default port 8080)
Auth:     Authorization: Bearer {your-key}
First:    POST /api/buckets  {"name": "my-bucket"}
Docs:     GET /scalar (interactive), GET /openapi/v1.json (spec)
```

## Authentication

| Method | Format | Scope |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Admin key | `Authorization: Bearer {key}` | Full access. Set via `CarbonFiles__AdminKey` env var |
| API key | `Authorization: Bearer cf4_{prefix}_{secret}` | Own buckets only |
| Dashboard JWT | `Authorization: Bearer {jwt}` | Admin-level, stateless, max 24h |
| Upload token | Query param `?token=cfu_{token}` | Single bucket, optional rate limit |

## URL Conventions

| Purpose | URL Pattern |
|---------|-------------|
| Human sharing (bucket) | `https://{dash-host}/buckets/{id}` |
| Human sharing (file) | `https://{dash-host}/buckets/{id}/files/{path}` |
| Direct download | `https://{api-host}/s/{code}` |
| API calls | `https://{api-host}/api/...` |

Never share raw `/api/` URLs with humans -- they return JSON. Dashboard and API may be on different subdomains.

## Endpoints

### Health

`GET /healthz` -- Public
```json
{ "status": "string", "uptime_seconds": number, "db": "string" }
```

### Buckets

`POST /api/buckets` -- Auth required -- 201
```json
// Request
{ "name": "string (required)", "description?": "string", "expires_in?": "string" }
// Response: Bucket
{ "id", "name", "owner", "description", "created_at", "expires_at", "last_used_at", "file_count": int, "total_size": long }
```

`GET /api/buckets` -- Auth required -- Query: `limit, offset, sort, order, include_expired` (admin only)
```json
{ "items": [Bucket], "total": int, "limit": int, "offset": int }
```

`GET /api/buckets/{id}` -- Public -- Query: `include=files` for embedded file list
```json
{ ...Bucket, "unique_content_count": int, "unique_content_size": long, "files?": [BucketFile], "has_more_files?": bool }
```

`PATCH /api/buckets/{id}` -- Owner/Admin
```json
{ "name?": "string", "description?": "string", "expires_in?": "string" }
```

`DELETE /api/buckets/{id}` -- Owner/Admin -- 204

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/summary` -- Public -- Returns `text/plain` bucket summary

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/zip` -- Public -- Returns ZIP stream with `Content-Disposition: attachment`

### Files

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/files` -- Public
Flat mode: Query `limit, offset, sort, order`
```json
{ "items": [BucketFile], "total": int, "limit": int, "offset": int }
```
Tree mode: Query `delimiter, prefix, cursor`
```json
{ "prefix", "delimiter", "directories": [{"path", "file_count", "total_size"}], "files": [BucketFile], "total_files": int, "total_directories": int, "cursor?": "string" }
```

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/ls` -- Public -- Query: `path, limit, offset, sort, order`
```json
{ "files": [BucketFile], "folders": ["string"], "total_files": int, "total_folders": int, "limit": int, "offset": int }
```

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/files/{path}` -- Public -- Returns BucketFile metadata

BucketFile shape:
```json
{ "path", "name", "size": long, "mime_type", "sha256", "created_at", "updated_at", "short_url?", "short_code?" }
```

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/files/{path}/content` -- Public -- Raw file bytes
Supports: `Range`, `ETag`, `If-None-Match`, `If-Modified-Since`, `?download=true`

`GET /api/buckets/{id}/files/{path}/verify` -- Public
```json
{ "path": "string", "stored_hash": "string", "computed_hash": "string", "valid": bool }
```

`DELETE /api/buckets/{id}/files/{path}` -- Owner/Admin -- 204

`PATCH /api/buckets/{id}/files/{path}/content` -- Owner/Admin/UploadToken
Range write: `Content-Range: bytes {start}-{end}/{total}`. Append: `X-Append: true` header. Returns updated BucketFile.

### Uploads

`POST /api/buckets/{id}/upload` -- Owner/Admin/UploadToken -- `multipart/form-data` -- 201
Field name = destination path (generic names like "file"/"files" use original filename).
```json
{ "uploaded": [{ ...BucketFile, "deduplicated": bool }] }
```

`PUT /api/buckets/{id}/upload/stream` -- Owner/Admin/UploadToken -- Query: `filename` (required) -- 201
Raw body = file bytes.
```json
{ "uploaded": [{ ...BucketFile, "deduplicated": bool }] }
```

### Upload Tokens

`POST /api/buckets/{id}/tokens` -- Owner/Admin -- 201
```json
// Request
{ "expires_in?": "string", "max_uploads?": int }
// Response
{ "token": "string", "bucket_id": "string", "expires_at": "string", "max_uploads": int, "uploads_used": int }
```

### API Keys (Admin only)

`POST /api/keys` -- 201 -- Full key returned ONCE
```json
// Request
{ "name": "string" }
// Response
{ "key": "string", "prefix": "string", "name": "string", "created_at": "string" }
```

`GET /api/keys` -- Paginated
```json
{ "items": [{ "prefix", "name", "created_at", "last_used_at", "bucket_count": int, "file_count": int, "total_size": long }], "total", "limit", "offset" }
```

`DELETE /api/keys/{prefix}` -- 204

`GET /api/keys/{prefix}/usage`
```json
{ "prefix", "name", "created_at", "last_used_at", "bucket_count", "file_count", "total_size", "total_downloads", "buckets": [Bucket] }
```

### Dashboard Tokens (Admin only)

`POST /api/tokens/dashboard` -- 201 -- Default 1h, max 24h
```json
// Request
{ "expires_in?": "string" }
// Response
{ "token": "string", "expires_at": "string" }
```

`GET /api/tokens/dashboard/me` -- Dashboard token auth
```json
{ "scope": "string", "expires_at": "string" }
```

### Stats (Admin only)

`GET /api/stats`
```json
{ "total_buckets", "total_files", "total_size", "total_keys", "total_downloads", "storage_by_owner": [{ "owner", "bucket_count", "file_count", "total_size" }] }
```

### Short URLs

`GET /s/{code}` -- Public -- 302 redirect to file content

`DELETE /api/short/{code}` -- Owner/Admin -- 204

### SignalR Hub

Endpoint: `/hub/files` (JSON protocol only). Auth via `?access_token=` query param.

Subscribe methods:
- `SubscribeToBucket(bucketId)` / `UnsubscribeFromBucket(bucketId)`
- `SubscribeToFile(bucketId, path)` / `UnsubscribeFromFile(bucketId, path)`
- `SubscribeToAll()` (admin only) / `UnsubscribeFromAll()`

Events:
- `FileCreated(bucketId, BucketFile)`, `FileUpdated(bucketId, BucketFile)`, `FileDeleted(bucketId, path)`
- `BucketCreated(Bucket)`, `BucketUpdated(bucketId, BucketChanges)`, `BucketDeleted(bucketId)`

## Workflows

### 1. Upload a file and get a share link
```bash
# Create bucket
BUCKET=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" -d '{"name":"my-bucket"}' https://api.example.com/api/buckets | jq -r .id)
# Upload file
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" -F "photo.jpg=@photo.jpg" https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/upload
# Share: https://dash.example.com/buckets/$BUCKET/files/photo.jpg (human)
# Or use short_url from upload response for direct download
```

### 2. Create upload token and share
```bash
BUCKET=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" -d '{"name":"uploads"}' https://api.example.com/api/buckets | jq -r .id)
TOKEN=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $KEY" -d '{}' https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/tokens | jq -r .token)
# Share upload URL: POST https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/upload?token=$TOKEN
```

### 3. Download bucket as ZIP
```bash
curl -OJ https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/zip
```

### 4. Real-time notifications
Connect to `/hub/files` via SignalR, invoke `SubscribeToBucket(bucketId)`, listen for `FileCreated`/`FileUpdated`/`FileDeleted`.

### 5. Verify file integrity
```bash
curl -s https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/files/photo.jpg/verify
# Check "valid": true
```

### 6. Browse directory tree
```bash
# One level
curl -s "https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/ls?path=docs/"
# Tree mode
curl -s "https://api.example.com/api/buckets/$BUCKET/files?delimiter=/&prefix=docs/"
```

### 7. Generate dashboard login URL
```bash
JWT=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_KEY" -d '{}' https://api.example.com/api/tokens/dashboard | jq -r .token)
# Login URL: https://dash.example.com/?token=$JWT
```

## SDK Quick Reference

**TypeScript** (`npm install @carbonfiles/client`):
```typescript
import { CarbonFilesClient } from "@carbonfiles/client";
const cf = new CarbonFilesClient("https://files.example.com", "cf4_your_key");
const bucket = await cf.buckets.create({ name: "my-bucket", expires_in: "30d" });
await cf.buckets[bucket.id].files.upload(file, "photo.jpg");
const files = await cf.buckets[bucket.id].files.list({ limit: 50 });
const data = await cf.buckets[bucket.id].files["photo.jpg"].download();
```

**C#** (`dotnet add package CarbonFiles.Client`):
```csharp
var client = new CarbonFilesClient("https://files.example.com", "cf4_your_key");
var bucket = await client.Buckets.CreateAsync(new CreateBucketRequest { Name = "my-bucket", ExpiresIn = "30d" });
await client.Buckets[bucket.Id].Files.UploadFileAsync("/path/to/photo.jpg");
var files = await client.Buckets[bucket.Id].Files.ListAsync();
var stream = await client.Buckets[bucket.Id].Files["photo.jpg"].DownloadAsync();
```

**Python** (`pip install carbonfiles`):
```python
from carbonfiles import CarbonFiles
cf = CarbonFiles("https://files.example.com", "cf4_your_key")
bucket = cf.buckets.create("my-bucket", expires="30d")
cf.buckets[bucket.id].files.upload("/path/to/photo.jpg")
page = cf.buckets[bucket.id].files.list(limit=50)
data = cf.buckets[bucket.id].files["photo.jpg"].download()
```

**PowerShell** (`Install-Module CarbonFiles`):
```powershell
Connect-CfServer -Uri "https://files.example.com" -Token "cf4_your_key"
$bucket = New-CfBucket -Name "my-bucket" -ExpiresIn "30d"
Send-CfFile -BucketId $bucket.Id -FilePath ./photo.jpg
Get-CfFile -BucketId $bucket.Id
Save-CfFileContent -BucketId $bucket.Id -FilePath "photo.jpg" -OutFile ./downloaded.jpg
```

**CLI** (`cf` -- self-contained binary, [releases](https://github.com/carbungo/carbon-files-cli)):
```bash
cf config set-url https://files.example.com
cf config set-key cf4_your_key
cf bucket create --name my-bucket --expires 30d
cf file upload $BUCKET_ID ./photo.jpg
cf file list $BUCKET_ID
cf file download $BUCKET_ID photo.jpg ./downloaded.jpg
```

## Error Handling

All errors return: `{ "error": "message", "hint?": "suggestion" }` (hint omitted when null)

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| 200 | OK |
| 201 | Created |
| 204 | No Content |
| 206 | Partial Content |
| 304 | Not Modified |
| 400 | Bad Request |
| 401 | Unauthorized |
| 403 | Forbidden |
| 404 | Not Found |
| 413 | Payload Too Large |
| 416 | Range Not Satisfiable |

## Content-Addressable Storage

Files stored by SHA-256 hash. Duplicate content stored once (dedup). Upload response includes `sha256` and `deduplicated: true/false`. Use `/verify` to check integrity. Short URLs point to content by hash.

## File Serving

- `Content-Type` from extension; text types get `; charset=utf-8`
- `Accept-Ranges: bytes` -- supports Range requests for streaming/seeking
- `ETag` -- SHA-256 hash for CAS files
- `Cache-Control: public, no-cache` -- always revalidate
- `?download=true` -- forces download via Content-Disposition
- HEAD supported on content and zip endpoints

## Conventions

- JSON: `snake_case`, null fields omitted
- IDs: 10-char alphanumeric (buckets), 6-char (short codes), `cf4_` prefix (API keys), `cfu_` prefix (upload tokens)
- Expiry: `30s`, `15m`, `2h`, `7d`, `2w`, Unix timestamps, ISO 8601, or `"never"`
- Pagination: `limit`, `offset`, `sort`, `order` on all list endpoints
- OpenAPI spec: `GET /openapi/v1.json`. Interactive docs: `GET /scalar`
